results.source: place the black bowl onto the white plate with red rim using the robot arm.

audit.text: use the robot arm to approach the black bowl, grasp it, lift it, move it toward the white plate with red rim, and place it onto the plate.
the robot arm first moves toward the black bowl, grasps it, lifts it upward, then lowers it toward the white plate with red rim before placing it there.

results.source: lift the bowl from the plate and hold it above, then release back onto the plate.

audit.text: Lift the bowl from the plate using the robot arm, move it upward to position it above the plate, and then release it back onto the plate.
Using the robot arm, grasp the bowl on the plate, lift it vertically to a position above the plate, and gently release it back onto the plate.
